Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/valorant_stats.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM vct_events''\); events = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]; cursor.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM matches''\); matches = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]; cursor.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM player_map_stats''\); pms = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]; print\(f''Events: {events}''\); print\(f''Matches: {matches}''\); print\(f''Player Map Stats: {pms}''\)")
